entities.name: Health Dashboard
entities.context: HTML-based dashboard that displays workout and health metrics including weekly minutes, weekly days, rolling 7-day averages, resting heart rate, sleep score, and sleep duration

entities.name: workout_dashboard
entities.context: Python module providing build_summary and build_metrics_summary functions for generating workout analytics

entities.name: weekly_minutes
entities.context: Metric tracking total workout minutes per week, visualized as a graph in the dashboard

entities.name: weekly_days
entities.context: Metric tracking number of workout days per week

entities.name: rolling_7d
entities.context: Rolling 7-day average metric for workout tracking

entities.name: resting_hr
entities.context: Resting heart rate metric tracked over time, optionally displayed in the dashboard

entities.name: sleep_score
entities.context: Sleep quality score metric, optionally displayed in the dashboard

entities.name: sleep_duration
entities.context: Sleep duration metric, optionally displayed in the dashboard

relationships.context: Dashboard renders output from workout_dashboard module's summary and metrics functions
Weekly minutes graph is a core visualization in the dashboard
Weekly days graph is a core visualization in the dashboard
Rolling 7-day graph is a core visualization in the dashboard
Resting heart rate is an optional graph in the dashboard
Sleep score is an optional graph in the dashboard
Sleep duration is an optional graph in the dashboard
Module processes weekly minutes data for summary generation
Module processes weekly days data for summary generation
